content.text:
*pause, a little longer this time*

Yeah.

Yeah, it is. Because... when you're a kid and you can't figure out how to make it okay, you don't think "this is an adult who is dysregulated and it's not my fault." You think — what did I do. What did I miss. What should I have seen coming.

So the fury makes sense. It was — it was a way of staying in control, I think. If it's my fault, then I can fix it. If it's just... random, then there's nothing I can do and that's —

*stops*

That's worse.
